1056.issue: [W1056] admin 7.6.17 listed as dependency but 7.6.20 is recommended. Please consider updating globalDependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.openligadb/blob/master/io-package.json).

3042.issue: [S3042] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" uses "ioBroker/testing-action-check@v2.0.0" with a pinned version. Consider locking only the major version "@v2" instead.

3043.issue: [S3043] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" uses "ioBroker/testing-action-adapter@v1.1.1" with a pinned version. Consider locking only the major version "@v1" instead.

3044.issue: [S3044] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" uses "ioBroker/testing-action-deploy@v1.5.0" with a pinned version. Consider locking only the major version "@v1" instead.

5054.issue: [S5054] method "setObject()" should be avoided. Please use "setObjectNotExists()" or "extendObject()" instead.

6022.issue: [S6022] CHANGELOG_OLD.md exists but no link to it was found in [README.md](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.openligadb/blob/master/README.md). Consider adding a link to CHANGELOG_OLD.md at the end of the Changelog section.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#799] "[iobroker-bot] Add CHANGELOG_OLD.md to store older changelog entries"](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.openligadb/issues/799)

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.openligadb/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.openligadb/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
